title: senecio soratae
intro: Senecio soratae, also known as the Andean wormwood or Andean ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to reduce pain and fight off infections. The health benefits of Senecio soratae include its potential to aid in digestion and reduce symptoms of fever and rheumatism, as well as its ability to act as a natural insect repellent. Senecio soratae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible addition to natural remedies.
